stages.concept:
# Unit 105: 3형식 / 4형식 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 문장의 **3형식**과 **4형식**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **3형식: 주어(S) + 동사(V) + 목적어(O)**

> I **like** music.
> 나는 음악을 좋아한다.

> She **ate** an apple.
> 그녀는 사과를 먹었다.

> He **studies** English every day.
> 그는 매일 영어를 공부한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **4형식: 주어(S) + 동사(V) + 간접목적어(IO) + 직접목적어(DO)**

> She **gave** me a book.
> 그녀는 나에게 책을 주었다. (나에게 = IO, 책을 = DO)

> He **bought** her a present.
> 그는 그녀에게 선물을 사주었다.

> My mom **made** me a cake.
> 엄마가 나에게 케이크를 만들어주셨다.

**Q. 다음 문장에서 '직접목적어(~을/를)'에 해당하는 부분을 고르세요.**
"He bought her a present."
1. He
2. her
3. a present ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. '누구에게(간접목적어)'에 해당하는 것은 her이고, '무엇을(직접목적어)'에 해당하는 것은 a present랍니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 4형식 동사: **give, buy, make, send, show, tell, teach, lend, bring** 등

👩‍🏫 선생님: 간접목적어(IO)는 **~에게**, 직접목적어(DO)는 **~을/를**에 해당해요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 3형식은 S+V+O, 4형식은 S+V+IO+DO! 4형식은 '누구에게 무엇을' 구조군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 105: 3형식 4형식 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 알맞은 문장의 형식을 고르시오.
I love ice cream.
> **정답** 3형식

---

**02.** She gave me a book.
> **정답** 4형식

---

**03.** He plays the guitar.
> **정답** 3형식

---

**04.** My mom made me a sandwich.
> **정답** 4형식

---

**05.** They study English every day.
> **정답** 3형식

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 각 성분을 표시하시오.
She gave him a present.
주어, 동사, 간접목적어, 직접목적어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** She(주어) / gave(동사) / him(간접목적어) / a present(직접목적어)

---

**07.** I read a book yesterday.
주어, 동사, 목적어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** I(주어) / read(동사) / a book(목적어)

---

**08.** He teaches us math.
주어, 동사, 간접목적어, 직접목적어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** He(주어) / teaches(동사) / us(간접목적어) / math(직접목적어)

---

**09.** She bought a new bag.
주어, 동사, 목적어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** She(주어) / bought(동사) / a new bag(목적어)

---

**10.** My dad told me a story.
주어, 동사, 간접목적어, 직접목적어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** My dad(주어) / told(동사) / me(간접목적어) / a story(직접목적어)

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 나에게 선물을 주었다.
She me a gift.
> **정답** gave

---

**12.** 나는 매일 영어를 공부한다.
I English every day.
> **정답** study

---

**13.** 엄마가 우리에게 저녁을 만들어 주셨다.
Mom us dinner.
> **정답** made

---

**14.** 그는 기타를 친다.
He the guitar.
> **정답** plays

---

**15.** 선생님이 우리에게 수학을 가르쳐 주신다.
The teacher us math.
> **정답** teaches

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 나에게 편지를 보냈다.
She me sent a letter
> **정답** She / sent / me / a / letter

---

**17.** 나는 음악을 듣는다.
listen I to music
> **정답** I / listen / to / music

---

**18.** 아빠가 나에게 자전거를 사 주셨다.
My dad me bought a bike
> **정답** My / dad / bought / me / a / bike

---

**19.** 그녀는 책을 읽는다.
reads She books
> **정답** She / reads / books

---

**20.** 친구가 나에게 사진을 보여 주었다.
My friend me showed a photo
> **정답** My / friend / showed / me / a / photo
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 105: 3형식  4형식 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
She teaches math in the school.
He asked me a question.
Tom wrote a letter in English.
Amy made some sandwiches for her child.
> **정답** He asked me a question.

---

**02.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Mom bought me a new laptop.
I liked his painting a lot.
The teacher gave him a second chance.
The stranger showed me the way to the
hospital.
> **정답** I liked his painting a lot.

---

**03.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
I bought a concert ticket.
I wrote a letter to my sister.
Tom showed me a picture of his childhood.
My mom baked cookies for my friends.
> **정답** Tom showed me a picture of his childhood.

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The cook always cooks delicious menus
customers.
I asked some questions the lady.
She teaches the students science.
Tom bought his daughter a bag.
• customer 손님, 고객
> **정답** The cook always cooks delicious menus customers.,
I asked some questions the lady.

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
She got me a pair of shoes yesterday.
Amy wrote a birthday card me.
The child told an interesting story me.
I will bake him some muffins for dinner.
> **정답** The child told an interesting story me., Amy wrote a
birthday card me.

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The restaurant looks nicely.
He cooked some noodles his friends.
Tom runs fast.
She found the key in the kitchen.
> **정답** The restaurant looks nicely., He cooked some
noodles his friends.

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 동사, 간접목적어, 직접목적어에 해당하는
말을 찾으시오.
동사  간접목적어  직접목적어
In the restaurant, Tom passed
me napkins.
> **정답** 
In the restaurant, Tom passed
me napkins.

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 동사, 간접목적어, 직접목적어에 해당하는
말을 찾으시오.
동사  간접목적어  직접목적어
Amy showed me her baby.
> **정답** 
Amy showed me her baby.

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 동사와 목적어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오.
동사  목적어
The police caught the thief in
the mall.
> **정답** 
The police caught the thief in
the mall.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The car moved slow.
The house looks really well.
Amy made her children cakes.
My mother will buy a new dress me on my
birthday.
> **정답** Amy made her children cakes.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The boy told the truth his parents.
Tom gave a key ring him as a gift.
Amy lent his brother an interesting book.
His story is very funny.
> **정답** Amy lent his brother an interesting book., His story
is very funny.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 학생들에게 수학을 가르친다.
She taught students math.
She teaches students math.
She teaches students to math.
She teaches math students.
> **정답** She teaches students math.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 그녀의 동생에게 곰인형을 사 주었다.
Amy bought a teddy bear her sister.
Amy buys a teddy bear her sister
Amy bought her sister a teddy bear.
Amy buys her a teddy bear.
> **정답** Amy bought her sister a teddy bear.

---

**14.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 형식으로 쓰인 문장을 고르시오.
<보기> She asked many questions in the meeting.
Amy was waiting at the nearest cafe.
She taught me English a year ago.
The builder built a house with red roof.
Tom became a well-known pianist.
> **정답** The builder built a house with red roof.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I ate the food with my two other friends.
Amy gave the present her father.
Tom wanted some snacks.
Amy bought me the beautiful dress for the
party.
> **정답** Amy gave the present her father.

---

**16.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 형식으로 쓰인 문장을 고르시오.
<보기> He took many pictures at his friend's wedding.
I didn't know the answer.
My dad bought me a new computer for my
birthday.
I was tired last night.
She smiled brightly.
> **정답** I didn't know the answer.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My dad and I made a dog house yesterday.
He is thirteen years old.
We write our parents a letter on Parents' Day.
My grandmother cooked a special dish me .
> **정답** My grandmother cooked a special dish me .

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
I will send a letter the English teacher.
She is writing her brother a letter.
I usually ride my bike to school.
Her voice sounds angrily.
> **정답** I usually ride my bike to school., She is writing her
brother a letter.

---

**19.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
My dad will cook dinner tonight.
I bought my sister a box of doughnuts at the
mall.
He showed a new apartment my family.
He is happily now.
> **정답** I bought my sister a box of doughnuts at the mall.,
My dad will cook dinner tonight.

---

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My mom bought a bike me.
I ordered a cheeseburger and French fries.
France is famous for cheese.
Can you tell me the way to the subway
station?
> **정답** My mom bought a bike me.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 105 3형식  4형식중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (동사 시제 주의)
나는 매일 아침 오렌지 쥬스를 마신다.
  (     )   (     )   (     )  every morning.
정답 I, drink, orange, juice

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (3형식으로 쓸 것)
(동사 시제 주의)
Clara는 온라인스토어에서 가방 하나를 샀다.
Clara  (     )   (     )   (     )  at an online store.
정답 bought, a, bag

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (동사 시제 주의)
나는 그에게 열쇠꾸러미를 건넸다. [pass, keys]
I  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 passed, him, keys

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (동사 시제 주의)
나는 엄마 생일에 나의 엄마에게 편지를 썼다. [write, a
letter]
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  on her
birthday.
정답 wrote, my, mother (mom), a, letter

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (동사 시제 주의)
Jeff는 그녀에게 한 가지 질문을 했다. [ask, a question]
Jeff  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 asked, her, a, question

---

**06.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (4형식 문장으로)
He asked questions his teacher.
He asked  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 his, teacher, questions

---

**07.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (4형식 문장으로)
He told to children a scary story.
He told  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 children, a, scary, story

---

**08.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A: What are you writing?
B: I am  (     )  Jake  (     )   (     ) . [a letter]
정답 writing, a, letter

---

**09.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A: What will you cook for lunch?
B: I will  (     )   (     )  for lunch. [noodles]
정답 cook, noodles

---

**10.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A: What will you buy for Marley's birthday?
B: I will  (     )   (     )   (     ) . [a cake]
정답 buy, a, cake

---

# Unit 105: 3형식 4형식 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
She teaches science at the school.
He asked me a favor.
Tom wrote a poem in English.
Amy made some pancakes for her family.
> 정답: He asked me a favor.

---

**02.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Mom bought me a new tablet.
I liked his drawing a lot.
The teacher gave her a second chance.
The guide showed me the way to the museum.
> 정답: I liked his drawing a lot.

I wrote a letter to my brother.
Tom showed me a photo of his trip.
My dad baked bread for my friends.
> 정답: Tom showed me a photo of his trip.

(2개) The baker always bakes delicious bread customers.

She teaches the children art.
Tom bought his son a toy.
> 정답: The baker always bakes delicious bread customers.,

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) She got me a pair of gloves yesterday.
Amy wrote a thank-you card me.
The boy told a funny story me.
I will bake her some brownies for dessert.
> 정답: The boy told a funny story me., Amy wrote a letter her friend.

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) The café looks nicely.
He cooked some pasta his family.
Tom runs quickly.
She found the wallet in the hallway.

**07.** 다음 문장에서 동사, 간접목적어, 직접목적어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오. 동사  간접목적어  직접목적어 In  the  cafeteria,  Tom  passed me  the  salt. > 정답:

**08.** 다음 문장에서 동사, 간접목적어, 직접목적어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오. 동사  간접목적어  직접목적어 Amy  showed  me  her  painting. > 정답:

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 동사와 목적어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오. 동사  목적어 The  guard  caught  the  intruder  in the  building. > 정답:

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The bus moved slow.
The garden looks really well.
Amy made her family sandwiches.
My father will buy a new phone me on my birthday.
> 정답: Amy made her family sandwiches.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) The girl told the truth her parents.
Tom gave a necklace him as a gift.
Amy lent her sister an interesting novel.
His joke is very funny.
> 정답: Amy lent her sister an interesting novel., His joke

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 학생들에게 과학을 가르친다.
He taught students science.

He teaches students to science.

**13.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.

Tom bought his sister a doll.

**14.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 형식으로 쓰인 문장을 고르시오.

Tom was waiting at the nearest café.
She taught me Korean a year ago.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I ate the meal with my two friends.
Amy gave the gift her mother.
Tom wanted some snacks.
She bought me the pretty scarf for the winter.

---

<보기> He took many photos at his friend's party.
I didn't know the answer.
My mom bought me a new bag for my birthday.
I was sleepy last night.
She waved happily.
> 정답: I didn't know the answer.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My mom and I made a bird house yesterday.
She is twelve years old.
We write our parents a card on Parents' Day.
My grandmother cooked a special meal me .
> 정답: My grandmother cooked a special meal me .

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I will send a message the math teacher.
She is writing her sister a letter.
I usually walk to school.
Her voice sounds angrily.
> 정답: I usually walk to school., She is writing her homework.

---

**19.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) My mom will cook lunch today.
I bought my brother a box of chocolates at the store.
He showed a new apartment my family.
He is happily now.
> 정답: I bought my brother a box of chocolates at the store.,

---

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My dad bought a laptop me.
I ordered a chicken sandwich and fries.
Japan is famous for sushi.
Can you tell me the way to the train station?
> 정답: My dad bought a laptop me.
